title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: RIGHT TRACK RESOURCE CENTER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of socks, gloves, hand warmers, shampoo, and conditioner. There is a donation bin in front of the facility. 501 3rd Street La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week Saturday, November 15, 2025-Sunday, March 15, 2026 (541) 910-3056 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 962-7994 Main phone Warming Station Person (541) 910-3056 Program Lead Maggie Mayhem Person (541) 910-6265 Housing Coordinator Frederick Kiel INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Union County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located between D Avenue and G Avenue Services: Camping Gear Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. RIGHT TRACK RESOURCE CENTER
